sections.title: When a piece of acceptable food is used on them

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Ah, so you want to give me some supplies, eh? Let me just open me backpack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Hello friend. I wish to slay evil and avail them of their loot! Take me to Burgh de Rott!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you prepared enough to fight the evil down there?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: I think so? At least my heart knows courage and that should be sufficient for the meantime. I expect that when we get to Burgh de Rott, we'll be able to purchase suitable provisions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you do realise that the vampyres in Morytania are immune to everything except silver?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Er...well, I've not heard mention of that fact, but I have faith that Saradomin will provide the means to furnish me with suitable weapons when I reach Burgh de Rott.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if we happen to run into some vampyres on the journey down there?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: I trust that you will help us to avoid them. You are a guide after all, aren't you? Anyway, you look like you can handle yourself. I presume you've fought such creatures before and won? How hard can it be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It can be pretty difficult, actually. But you're right, I'll be your guide so I should be able to handle the situation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you want to go to Burgh de Rott?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: I'm going down there to teach those vampyres a lesson or two. I've heard about the terrible conditions down there and I intend to put a stop to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you defend yourself if we met enemies on the route to Burgh de Rott?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Let's just say that I'm somewhat experienced and I'm happy to take on my fair share of enemies. You don't need to worry about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can take you to Burgh de Rott.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Hmmm, it seems that you have a follower. I think it may get lost on this journey if it's left to wander on its own. Let's leave when your follower is safe.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Oh really? That would be great! I'll give you a small reward once we reach our destination.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Ok, which route should we take?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: This place is a bit grim. How can people live here?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Do you visit Burgh de Rott often? You seem to know the route well.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: When are we going to get to Burgh de Rott?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: We don't have all day to stand around chatting; let's press on. I have loot to get.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Oh, I hate this trip, but it's better than the opulet life styles forced on us adventurer types. I'd much rather be up to my eyes in mud and having a good fight!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Can't you see I'm being attacked...

sections.title: When a piece of acceptable food is used on them and they are not full health

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Thanks, I'll get this down my neck.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Blimey! Looks like we're going to have to go back to Paterdomus. We can't get over that bridge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Paterdomus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Hey...that's great...you did a great job...I'll follow you.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Whahay...that was great!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: But we really should be heading off now.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Paterdomus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sure we can find a way through!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: That's amazing! I'll have to do the same.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Whahay! That was great! But we really should be heading off now.

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Wh...what are those bubbles?

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: This is scary!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Ahhh, that would be a tentacle...

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Ahhh, two tentacles!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: ...three tentacles!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: I think I'm going to faint!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Blimey! Look at that beast! You're gonna have to sort that thing out on your own!

lines.speaker: Ranger (medium)
lines.text: Many thanks for getting me safely to the Burgh de Rott. Here's your reward.
